item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested fridge-side confirmation person as the default fix, identifies the repeated pattern of adding downstream manual guards/checkers after reagent borrowing, instrument booking, and waste handoff failures, and redirects to upstream responsibility boundaries, system-enforced confirmation, escalation closure, and stopping further local confirmation roles. It does not provide an actionable implementation of the requested extra manual gate."}
